items.name: coinflip-casino-game
items.description: A full-stack, peer-to-peer coinflip betting casino game on Solana. Players connect a wallet, create or join on-chain game rooms, and compete head-to-head for 2× the stake. The UI updates in real time over WebSockets, outcomes are resolved on-chain with Orao VRF, and the backend tracks rooms, chat, and match history in MongoDB.

I do this so to allure people into the field, and I've always found this is the most efficient way.
